title: pavonia varians
intro: Pavonia varians, also known as the rock rose or rose mallow, is a perennial plant species within the family Malvaceae. It is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, recognized for its bright pink to purple flowers and medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing pain, inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health. Pavonia varians can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
